member.name: F:AkEventPlayableInspector.MinimumDurationInSeconds
member.summary: The minimum clip duration. This value is set to 1/60 of a second which generally represents the time of 1 frame.

member.name: M:AkEventPlayableInspector.UpdateClipInformation(UnityEngine.Timeline.TimelineClip,AK.Wwise.Event,UnityEditor.SerializedObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates the associated clip information and the event durations.
member.returns: Returns true if the Wwise event is found in the project data.
